title: Score Entry & Controls
seoTitle: Game of Darts Score Entry & Controls | BarkinMad Studios
description: Understand score entry, keypad flow, external keyboard shortcuts, player selection, and current control limitations in Game of Darts.
summary: Game of Darts uses mode-specific score entry and hit/miss inputs, with documented keyboard shortcuts for some scoring views.
heroImageAlt: Artwork for Game of Darts controls image
sourceNotes: Control notes are based on HelpView keyboard shortcut copy and inspected keypad/source files.
Mode-specific touch layouts need final screenshot capture.

sections.heading: Score entry
paragraphs: Game of Darts uses mode-specific input: X01-style score entry for Match play, hit/miss or target-based flows for training and party modes, and specialist scoring views for Cricket and Snooker.
The app records the scoring state through per-mode view models and persists sessions for supported modes.

sections.heading: Keyboard shortcuts
paragraphs: The in-app help documents external keyboard shortcuts for Match Darts: number keys enter scores, Enter confirms, Delete removes a score, and U undoes the last entered score.
All 5s and Halve It also document number entry, Enter confirmation, and Delete removal. Some hit/miss shortcut sections remain simulator-only or under development.
